para_trans: Inspector of Electricity, Group-A (Gazetted)
Extension of tenure of cadre officers
About the year 2026.
Government of Maharashtra
Industries, Energy, Labour and Mining Department
GOVERNMENT ORDER NO. CHANGE-2026 / P.No.76 / ENERGY-1
Madam Cama Marg, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,
Mantralaya, Mumbai 32.
Date: 1st June, 2026.
Read: - 1) Regulation of transfers of Maharashtra Government employees and in the discharge of government duties.
The Prevention of Delay Act, 2005.
2) Maharashtra Civil Service (Retirement period, Non-Service and Suspension, Dismissal and Removal from Service)
The Provisions of Time) Rules, 1981.
3) Department of Industries, Power and Labour, Government Notification No. Narrow-2016 / No.70 / Energy-5,
Government Orders: -
Regulation of transfers of Maharashtra Government employees and in the discharge of government duties.
Power under sections 4 (1), (2), (3), (4) as well as sections 5 (1) and (2) of the Prevention of Delay Act, 2005
The Inspector of Electricity, Group-I in the office of the Chief Electrical Inspector, Mumbai, under the administrative control of the Department-
The officers of the cadre A (Gazetted) are listed in front of their names in column No. Enabled as shown in 4.
The extension is being granted on administrative grounds with the approval of the authorities.
table_trans: Name and designation of the officer
Mr. Aslam Hussain Mujawar, Electrical Inspector.

The earlier extension has been in 2025 as he is undergoing cancer treatment. Also, Mr. Mujawar is retiring on D 31.05.2027 and with less than 1 year left in his retirement, 1 year extension in the post of Electrical Inspector, Inspection Department, Satara.
Mr. Sandeep Bhaskar Mahajan, Electrical Inspector.
Extension in the post of Electrical Inspector, Inspection Department, Dhule as there is less than 1 month left for retirement.

The said Government Order is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
